summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares her excitement about receiving physical copies of her new book 'The Shame Machine.' The post consists of a single enthusiastic sentence and a photo of the books. It serves as a personal milestone marker rather than substantive analysis. The post celebrates the tangible arrival of what would become her exploration of how shame is weaponized in society.
key_points: O'Neil's book 'The Shame Machine' has been published and physical copies have arrived
The post captures the author's genuine excitement at this milestone moment
This signals a new direction in her work examining shame as a social and economic tool
money_quotes: Look what came in the mail today, I'm so psyched!
key_insight: Sometimes a blog post is simply a moment of celebration marking the arrival of years of work in physical form.
